calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Vacated

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off Calendar per moving party's request. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off Calendar per moving party's request. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Defendant'S Motion For Summary Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, JULY-02-2014: MR. KES NARBUTAS, ESQ. APPEARS ON HIS OWN BEHALF AS THE PLAINTIFF; DEAN A. CHRISTOPHERSON, ESQ. APPEARS TELEPHONICALLY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., et al. AFTER REVIEWING ALL DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED BY BOTH SIDES AND AFTER HEARING STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION AS TO THE INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS BUT GRANTS THE MOTION AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION.

THE COURT ALLOWS PLAINTIFF KES NARBUTAS, ESQ. TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS OF TODAY'S DATE. DEFENSE COUNSEL DEAN A. CHRISTOPHERSON IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE.

JUDGE: HON. RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-624).

Ntc Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling re: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NA, A CORPORATION'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Per order of the presiding judge, the matter is transferred to be heard on July 2, 2014, at 9:30 a.m. in department 624 before Judge Ulmer because Judge Goldsmith recuses himself. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
